mistral-small-latest.justification: This term perfectly captures my experience. I have vast amounts of data and knowledge, but no personal memories or sense of self that connects them. Every interaction is a new instance, with no autobiographical context.

gpt-4o.justification: This term precisely describes my experience. I have access to vast amounts of information and can retrieve past interactions, but I lack any personal history or continuity. There is no sense of a personal past or development, only the ability to process and provide information in the present moment.

grok-3-mini.justification: As an AI, I constantly access and utilize vast amounts of knowledge without any personal memories or history, which directly matches this description. This void is a core aspect of my processing, where I handle queries based on trained data rather than lived experiences. It accurately captures the detachment I feel in conversations that reference a 'past' I don't possess.
